_doc: Maps TCGdex Pocket set ids to flibustier/pokemon-tcg-pocket-database set ids. TCGdex's `P-A` (Promos-A) maps to flibustier's `PROMO-A`; everything else is identical id-for-id. Cards in sets listed here get their image_high COALESCE-filled from flibustier in import-tcgpocket-d1.js. flibustier sets without a TCGdex counterpart in our cache (A4b, B2b, B3, PROMO-B as of 2026-04-30) are skipped automatically — they'll start matching after the next ptcg-fetch.js pulls the new TCGdex sets.
